✦ Bengaluru · BEL Layout · Byadarahalli

Dishitha Allergy
Chest & Skin Clinic

A multi-speciality clinic offering Pulmonology and Allergy, Dermatology and ENT care under one roof. We are dedicated to deliver quality patient care, appropriate diagnosis and patient-tailored holistic treatment approach with our team of experienced consultants.

Our mission is to serve with compassion, dedication and commitment to as many people as possible in the field of medicine.

What We Treat

Our Specialities

A dedicated team of consultants covering four core medical specialities with modern equipments and personalised care.

🫁

Pulmonology & Allergy

Expert diagnosis and management of respiratory diseases and allergies with advanced modern equipments.

AsthmaCOPDAllergiesSleep Study
🧴

Dermatology & Trichology

Comprehensive skin and hair care including medical dermatology, cosmetic procedures and aesthetic treatments.

SkinHair LossCosmeticPRP
👂

ENT

Diagnosis and treatment of ear, nose and throat conditions including sinusitis, foreign body removal and hearing tests.

SinusitisEar CareThroat
🏥

General & OPD Care

Routine health check-ups, blood pressure and blood sugar monitoring, dispensary and IV fluids administration.

Health Check-upBP/SugarIV Fluids

Meet the Team

Our Doctors

Experienced specialists united by a shared commitment to patient-centred, evidence-based care. Tap a card to read more.

Dr. K. Prashanth

MBBS, MD (Pulmonology)
DNB, MNAMS, DAA (CMC Vellore)
Consultant Pulmonologist & Allergologist
Associate Professor
Pulmonology
Dr Kanabur Prashanth completed his MBBS from Sri Devraj Urs Medical College, Kolar and MD in Pulmonary Medicine from Rajarajeshwari Medical College, Bengaluru. He holds a Diploma in Allergy and Asthma from CMC Vellore, DNB in Pulmonary Medicine and MNAMS. He has also completed a course in Artificial Intelligence in Healthcare. With 10 years of experience, he is an expert in Asthma, Allergy, Airway disorders, TB, Sleep disorders and various pulmonary diagnostic and therapeutic procedures.

Dr. Lavanya P.

MBBS, MD (Dermatology)
GMC Nagpur, DNB
Consultant Dermatologist & Trichologist
Dermatology
Dr Lavanya completed her MBBS from Hassan Institute of Medical Sciences and MD in Dermato-Venereo-Leprology from Government Medical College, Nagpur. She is a Diplomate of National Board (DNB). She has worked as Senior Resident in medical colleges at Nagpur and Bengaluru. With 9 years of experience she is expert in General Dermatology, STDs, Cosmetology, Hair and Nail disorders and various Dermatological procedures.

Dr. K. Thirthashree

MBBS, MD (Pulmonology)
DNB, MNAMS, EDARM
Consultant Pulmonologist
Assistant Professor
Pulmonology
Dr Thirthashree completed her MBBS from Sri Devraj Urs Medical College, Kolar and MD in Pulmonary Medicine from Kempegowda Institute of Medical Sciences, Bengaluru. She holds DNB, MNAMS and a European Degree in Adult Respiratory Medicine (EDARM) from Switzerland. With 9 years of experience she is expert in Asthma, Airway disorders, TB, Sleep disorders and Interventional Pulmonology.

Dr. Lalitha P.

MBBS, MD (Microbiology)
General Practitioner & Microbiologist
Retired Govt. Civil Surgeon
General
Dr Lalitha completed her MBBS from Sri Venkateshwara Medical College, Tirupathi and MD in Microbiology from PES Medical College, Kuppam. She has over 35 years of experience in AP Government Health and Family Welfare. She has served as Medical Officer, Civil Surgeon, District Medical Officer, Joint Director of AIDS Control Program, Vijayawada and Principal of a Regional Health Training Centre, Kurnool.

Dr. K. Ashok

MBBS, DLO (ENT)
Bangalore Medical College
ENT Surgeon & General Practitioner
Retired from BEML
ENT
Dr Ashok completed his MBBS and Diploma in Oto-Rhino-Laryngology from Bangalore Medical College, Bengaluru. He has a vast experience of over 35 years in ENT and has served in various hospitals and medical colleges. He was associated with BEML, KGF for 25 years as Head of the Department. He is expert in Ear, Nose and Throat disorders and various surgical procedures.

Procedures & Treatments

Services We Offer

Click a department to explore our full range of consultations and procedures.

Consultation For

  • Skin diseases and infections
  • Sexually transmitted diseases
  • Hair loss and scalp disorders
  • Nail disorders
  • Aesthetics and Cosmetology
  • Pediatric dermatology
  • Anti-aging treatment
  • Acne (pimples) and acne scars
  • Psoriasis
  • Vitiligo & Leprosy

Procedures & Services

  • Electrocautery & radiofrequency ablation
  • Chemical cautery
  • Extraction (Milia, Comedone, Molluscum)
  • Intralesional injections
  • Facial Rejuvenation – Chemical Peels, Microneedling, Mesotherapy
  • PRP / GFC therapy
  • Botox / Fillers
  • Ulcer management & PRF dressing
  • Excision of Cysts and Lipoma
  • Scar management

Consultation For

  • Cough & Breathing difficulties
  • Asthma and allergic rhinitis
  • Food and other allergies
  • COPD
  • Tuberculosis / Pneumonia / COVID-19
  • Sleep disorders
  • Interstitial lung diseases
  • Smoking cessation

Diagnostic & Therapy

  • Pulmonary function tests
  • Allergy testing (Skin prick test)
  • Immunotherapy
  • Nebulization
  • Sleep study
  • Bronchoscopy

Consultation & Treatment

  • Ear, Nose & Throat diseases and infections
  • Sinusitis management
  • Foreign body removal
  • Ear wash
  • Ear and nose piercing

General Health Services

  • General health check-up and OPD care
  • Dispensary
  • Blood pressure and blood sugar testing
  • IV fluids administration
  • Fever and general medical management
  • Treatment of infections
  • Antibiotics stewardship
